summary: Plan-mode classification completed for the five listed open PR candidates. No GitHub mutations are recommended. No PR has complete merge preflight because none has a recorded clean Codex /review in the hydrated artifact; #93923 has a concrete contributor-branch repair path, while #93930 and #93949 require human follow-up because their blockers are unresolved author/proof decisions.

actions.reason: Active author follow-up and unresolved review-bot findings block merge or automated repair planning without maintainer judgment.
Useful small PR, but it should remain an independent review item until the stale proof/review state is reconciled and merge preflight is complete.
Repair the contributor branch rather than merge now: the PR is focused and modifiable, but it needs the failing shard resolved and a clean Codex /review preflight.
This is a plausible candidate fix for #79099, but merge is blocked until review/preflight evidence is hydrated and clean.
Missing real behavior proof and failing CI require author or maintainer follow-up before automated repair or merge can be safely planned.

needs_human: #93930: active author follow-up plus unresolved ClawSweeper needs-changes finding.
#93949: real behavior proof and CI failures block merge/repair decision without follow-up.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #93923 so it can serve as the focused fix path for open issue #79252, which reports that globalCircuitBreakerThreshold is per-tool-type rather than session-global.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix: make global tool loop breaker session-wide
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair path for Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260617T081753-008.

This carries forward contributor work from #93923 by @harjothkhara to fix #79252. The repair should keep the branch narrow, resolve the failing checks-node-agentic-commands-doctor-device shard, add or adjust changelog coverage if the behavior is user-facing, run the targeted loop-detection tests plus pnpm check:changed, and request a fresh Codex /review before merge consideration.

Credit: source PR #93923 by @harjothkhara.
validation_commands: Codex /review on the repaired PR branch
